stock_market.summary: US stock futures ticked higher on March 31 amid hopes for Iran conflict de-escalation, despite a volatile March characterized by correction concerns and inflation warnings.

key_metrics.market_trend: Volatile recovery; focus on geopolitical impact (Iran).
key_metrics.impact: S&P 500, Dow, and Nasdaq faced declines in March; monitoring inflation and rate hike signals.

art_market.summary: The art market shows resilient recovery, with a 4% global growth in 2025 and continued strength in high-end, blue-chip segments despite global geopolitical turmoil.

key_metrics.major_events: Strong spring auction results in London and NYC; renewed optimism for 2026.
key_metrics.status: Resilient; emphasis on discipline, quality, and provenance.
